message:
fix: clippy lint in preflight eval test and simplify SSE scanned_len update

extension_preflight.rs: Replace `.unwrap().clone()` with `*expr.unwrap()`
to dereference the u8 byte directly instead of cloning, satisfying the
`clone_on_copy` clippy lint.

sse.rs: Consolidate the scanned_len assignment that was duplicated across
four branches (fast-path consumed/not-consumed, slow-path consumed/not)
into a single assignment after the if/else block. Since scanned_len
should always equal buffer.len() after processing (the entire remaining
buffer has been scanned), this simplification removes three redundant
assignments and one dead else-branch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
